title: Pittsburgh Pirates capture 8-3 exhibition victory over Toronto Blue Jays
description: BRADENTON — Oneil Cruz and Spencer Horwitz homered to lead the Pittsburgh Pirates to an 8-3 win over the Toronto Blue Jays in spring-training action Saturday. Horwitz belted a solo homer against his former team off Toronto starter Kevin Gausman in the fourth inning. Cruz added a two-run shot in the sixth for Pittsburgh (16-11). The post Pittsburgh Pirates capture 8-3 exhibition victory over Toronto Blue Jays appeared first on Medicine Hat News .
